data.title: Meet the AI-powered fan companion: TGR Haas F1 Team RaceMate powered by Infobip
data.description: A new collaboration has been announced between the TGR Haas F1 team and Infobip, a global AI-first cloud communications platform. The partnership will see the launch of the 'TGR Haas F1 Team RaceMate powered by Infobip' initiative in Vodnjan, Croatia. This joint venture aims to leverage Infobip's technology expertise to enhance the performance of the F1 team.

data.title: New AccuCode CV Platform Brings Specialty-Specific Intelligence to Cardiovascular Coding
data.description: MedAxiom and AccuCode AI have recently unveiled AccuCode CV in Jacksonville Beach, Florida. This innovative AI-augmented cardiovascular coding engine aims to enhance revenue integrity through improved accuracy, faster turnaround times, and cost reduction. AccuCode CV is tailored to address intricate and high-risk cardiovascular coding cases, providing specialty-specific intelligence. By utilizing this platform, provider organizations can enhance their coding precision, streamline processes, and maintain quality standards.

data.title: Pearl Brings Dental AI Natively into Dentrix Ascend
data.description: In Los Angeles, Pearl, a top provider of dental AI solutions, revealed a new integration with Dentrix Ascend, the cloud-based dental technology by Henry Schein One. This integration allows real-time pathology results to appear as x-rays are taken, all within the Dentrix Ascend platform. Previously, dental AI at point of care faced obstacles due to disjointed workflows, involving switching platforms, manual image imports, and aligning results across systems. This move streamlines processes for dental professionals.

data.title: Hexure Offers Real-Time Case Status Visibility and Enhanced Post-Issue Servicing in FireLight Through Expanded DTCC Partnership
data.description: In Dallas, a recent development by Hexure has integrated enhanced post-issue servicing into FireLight, offering real-time case visibility and boosting sales and operations. This was made possible through an expanded integration with DTCC. The implementation aims to accelerate processes and improve efficiency, catering to the growing need for streamlined services.

data.title: WellSky® Launches AI-Powered Ambient Documentation for Personal Care, Enabled by AutoMynd
data.description: WellSky's Ambient Documentation solution, based in Overland Park, Kansas, simplifies assessment completion, care plan evaluation, and client onboarding processes for personal care agencies. This innovative solution aims to enhance efficiency and effectiveness within the industry, benefiting both agencies and clients alike.

data.title: JASMINE Trial Demonstrates Prolacta's Human Milk-Based Fortifiers Deliver Superior Growth in Premature Infants While Maintaining Japan's Renowned Low NEC Rate
data.description: Improved long-term neurodevelopment has been linked to better growth, with the use of Prolacta's human milk-based fortifiers showing to be a safe and effective alternative in Japan. This is a departure from Japan's traditional practice of delaying cow milk-based fortifiers to prevent complications. The JASMINE data utilized by Japan's Ministry of Health, Labour, and Welfare supports this shift, highlighting the benefits of this new approach. This change has led to significant improvements in long-term neurodevelopment outcomes, emphasizing the importance of choosing the right fortifiers for infant health.

data.title: ActiveState Curated Catalog Secures AI-Generated Code Across Any Development Environment
data.description: ActiveState, based in Vancouver, BC, announced on April 30, 2026, that they have developed a unique open source security layer designed to manage dependency ingestion for AI coding assistants. This tool is the only one of its kind that is not specific to any particular AI tool, allowing developers to utilize it regardless of the platform they are working on. This innovation is crucial as AI coding assistants become more prevalent in the industry.

data.title: DBGI Executes Apparel Licensing Partnership Through GCC Supporting Existing U.S. Program Deliveries up to $125 Million in Aggregate Value
data.description: A publicly traded eCommerce and Fashion company, DBGI Corp. (NASDAQ: DBGI), based in Austin, Texas, has recently revealed a significant development. The company has successfully established an apparel licensing initiative through Global Combat Collective (GCC). This collaboration is projected to boost DBGI Corp.'s U.S. program deliveries by potentially up to $125 million. However, this value is subject to the issuance of delivery orders, meeting program prerequisites, and adhering to standard contract conditions. GCC serves as a licensed commercial partner, facilitating opportunities for product distribution.

data.title: Limbach to Participate in Oppenheimer 21st Annual Industrial Growth Conference
data.description: In Tampa, Limbach Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: LMB), a firm specializing in building systems solutions for critical mechanical, electrical, plumbing, and controls needs, revealed that its President and CEO, Michael McCann, and Executive VP and CFO, Jayme Brooks, are scheduled to take part in the Oppenheimer 21st Annual Industrial Growth Conference. This conference serves as a platform for industry leaders to discuss trends and strategies, enabling Limbach to showcase its expertise. With its focus on MEPC systems, the Company seeks to expand its network and explore growth opportunities.

data.title: Nexalus and TuffTek Announce Strategic Collaboration to Deliver Advanced Liquid Cooling Solutions for Defence and Edge Applications
data.description: In CORK, Ireland, Nexalus, specializing in advanced liquid cooling and thermal energy solutions, has partnered with TuffTek, a manufacturer of rugged infrastructure for defense and mission-critical settings. This collaboration aims to create cutting-edge liquid-cooled platforms for high-performance computing and AI in tactical edge scenarios, such as modern defense and security operations. The collaboration's focus is on designing and developing next-gen solutions to support these functionalities.

LAGARDE SAYS ECB DEBATED VARIOUS OPTIONS INCLUDING RATE HIKE

data.title: TouchMath® Launches Grades 3-5 Multisensory Math Solution for Special Education and Intervention
data.description: A groundbreaking solution has been introduced to address a crucial issue in math education, particularly for grades 3-5 students with special needs in Colorado Springs. As math content becomes increasingly intricate, there is a need for proven multisensory resources. TouchMath®, a reputable provider of explicit math instruction, has stepped in to fill this gap. The innovative approach aims to enhance learning for special education students and ensure their success in math. This development, announced on April 30, 2026, marks a significant advancement in catering to the educational needs of these students.

data.title: BCN Announces Corporate Partnership with the Kravis Center for the Performing Arts
data.description: Boca Raton, FL - On April 30, 2026, BCN, a top managed network technology solutions provider based in Boca Raton and catering to businesses nationwide and globally, revealed a significant collaboration with the renowned Kravis Center for the Performing Arts. This partnership signifies a landmark achievement for BCN, highlighting its commitment to innovation and growth within the industry.

data.title: IntelePeer Appoints Strategic Investor Mary Schroeder to Board to Support Next Phase of Healthcare AI Growth
data.description: An accomplished finance professional with expertise in governance, risk management, and strategic growth has joined IntelePeer to enhance healthcare operations through AI automation. The Dania Beach-based company revealed on April 30, 2026, that it is a leading provider of AI-driven automation tools for the healthcare sector.

data.title: A Record-Breaking Cinco de Mayo: Avocados From Mexico Celebrates Estimated 235M+ Pounds of Avocados With This Can't-Miss Guac Fiesta
data.description: In collaboration with actor and producer Diego Boneta, a renowned brand is introducing an innovative guacamole collection featuring unique variations such as Hot Honey and Spicy Dill Pickle. This initiative aims to revolutionize the classic dip experience. Additionally, the United States is expected to set a new import record by bringing in over 235 million pounds of Mexican products.

data.title: Newmark Reports First Quarter 2026 Financial Results
data.description: A conference call has been arranged to discuss the results, set for 11:30 a.m. ET today. Reported on April 30, 2026, Newmark Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: NMRK) disclosed its financial results for the first quarter of 2026 and announced its quarterly dividend. Newmark, a prominent commercial real estate advisor serving large institutional investors, global corporations, and owners/occupiers, provided this update. Further details can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: LALA® Introduces LALA Plus™, a High-Protein Drinkable Yogurt Smoothie for the Whole Family
data.description: LALA Plus™, a new product from the renowned Mexican dairy brand LALA®, is specially designed for daily nutrition. It comes in four authentic fruit variants and offers a unique mix of functional advantages. Launched on April 30, 2026, in Dallas, the product promises to deliver high-quality and delicious options to consumers.
ECB President Lagarde: Given our position, six weeks is the right time to evaluate progress.

data.title: Ave Maria Mutual Funds Celebrates 25 Years of Morally Responsible Investing and Announces the Launch of the Ave Maria Undiscovered Fund
data.description: Ave Maria Mutual Funds, based in Plymouth, Michigan, commemorates its 25th anniversary as the biggest family of pro-life Catholic-themed mutual funds in the US. Established in 2001, it has become a prominent name in morally responsible investing. The company boasts a range of funds, helping investors merge their financial objectives with the fundamental moral principles of the Catholic Church. As it marks over two decades in the sector, Ave Maria Mutual Funds continues to thrive as a respected investment group dedicated to ethical investing.
